turn1.prompt: 读一下那个 README 开头并用一句话总结
turn1.text: RustClaw 是一个基于 Rust 的本地智能体运行时，支持通过 Telegram、WhatsApp、飞书和浏览器 UI 等多渠道进行日常任务操作，集成了任务路由、工具执行、记忆管理、调度、多模态技能和基于 user_key 的身份认证等功能。
messages: RustClaw 是一个基于 Rust 的本地智能体运行时，支持通过 Telegram、WhatsApp、飞书和浏览器 UI 等多渠道进行日常任务操作，集成了任务路由、工具执行、记忆管理、调度、多模态技能和基于 user_key 的身份认证等功能。

turn2.text: # RustClaw Chinese version: `README.zh-CN.md` RustClaw is a local Rust-based agent runtime for everyday operations through Telegram, WhatsApp, Feishu/Lark, and a browser UI. It combines task routing, tool execution, memory, scheduling, multimodal skills, and `user_key` based identity into one deployable stack. ## What It Is For RustClaw is designed to let you: - chat with an agent from multiple channels - run built-in skills such as file, HTTP, crypto, image, and service tasks - manage users and permissions with `user_key` - use a local UI for monitoring and daily administration - keep conversation memory and resumable multi-step tasks ## Quick Start ### 1. Prerequisites ```bash rustup default stable python3 --version ``` Python `3.11+` is recommended. ### 2. Install the `rustclaw` command ```bash # Standard install bash install-rustclaw-cmd.sh # Install without sudo bash install-rustclaw-cmd.sh --user ``` Verify: ```bash command -v rustclaw rustclaw -h rustclaw -status ``` ### 3. Configure your model and channels Main config: `configs/config.toml` Channel configs: - `configs/channels/telegram.toml` - `configs/channels/whatsapp.toml` - `configs/channels/feishu.toml` Common split configs: - `configs/image.toml` - `configs/audio.toml` - `configs/crypto.toml` ### 4. Start RustClaw ```bash # Full start with UI rustclaw -start --vendor openai --model gpt-4.1 --profile release --channels all --with-ui --quick # Another vendor example rustclaw -start --vendor qwen --model qwen-max-latest --profile release --channels all --quick # Simple mode rustclaw -start release all ``` ### 5. Daily operations ```bash rustclaw -status rustclaw -logs clawd 200 --follow rustclaw -health rustclaw -stop ``` Legacy scripts are still available: ```bash ./start-all.sh ./stop-rustclaw.sh ``` ## Keys, Identity, and Permissions RustClaw uses `user_key` as the primary identity across UI and messaging channels. - permissions are resolved by `user_key` - channel conversations are resolved by `channel + external_chat_id` - the UI uses the same auth model as Telegram and WhatsApp - `clawd` can bootstrap the first admin key when the auth table is empty Key management: ```bash rustclaw -key list rustclaw -key generate user rustclaw -key generate admin scripts/auth-key.sh list ``` ## Local UI and API The listen address is configured in `configs/config.toml`, usually `127.0.0.1:8787` or `0.0.0.0:8787`. UI: - URL: `http://127.0.0.1:8787/` - static files: `UI/dist` - override UI directory with `RUSTCLAW_UI_DIST` - the browser stores a valid `user_key` locally and sends it with `X-RustClaw-Key` Important API endpoints: - `GET /v1/health` - `POST /v1/tasks` - `GET /v1/tasks/{task_id}` - `POST /v1/tasks/cancel` - `GET /v1/auth/me` - `POST /v1/auth/channel/bind` - `GET/POST /v1/auth/crypto-credentials` Examples: ```bash curl http://127.0.0.1:8787/v1/health \ -H "X-RustClaw-Key: rk-xxxx" curl -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8787/v1/tasks \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -H "X-RustClaw-Key: rk-xxxx" \ -d '{"user_id":1,"chat_id":1,"user_key":"rk-xxxx","channel":"ui","external_user_id":"local-ui","external_chat_id":"local-ui","kind":"ask","payload":{"text":"hello","agent_mode":true}}' ``` ## Common Telegram Commands - `/start` - `/help` - `/agent on|off` - `/status` - `/cancel` - `/skills` - `/run ` - `/sendfile ` - `/voicemode show|voice|text|both|reset` - `/openclaw config show|vendors|set ` - `/cryptoapi show` - `/cryptoapi set binance ` - `/cryptoapi set okx ` ## Crypto Credentials Exchange credentials are stored per `user_key`, not as one shared global secret for all users. - supported live exchanges: `binance`, `okx` - risk controls are defined in `configs/crypto.toml` - credentials are stored in `exchange_api_credentials` - each `user_key` has its own exchange credential record You can manage crypto credentials through: - `GET/POST /v1/auth/crypto-credentials` - Telegram `/cryptoapi ...` commands - `scripts/import-crypto-credentials.sh` for legacy migration ## Built-in Skills Common built-in skills include: - `archive_basic` - `audio_synthesize` - `audio_transcribe` - `chat` - `config_guard` - `crypto` - `db_basic` - `docker_basic` - `fs_search` - `git_basic` - `health_check` - `http_basic` - `image_edit` - `image_generate` - `image_vision` - `log_analyze` - `package_manager` - `process_basic` - `rss_fetch` - `service_control` - `system_basic` - `x` ## Important Files and Directories - `configs/config.toml`: main runtime config - `configs/channels/*.toml`: channel-specific config - `configs/image.toml`: image skill config - `configs/audio.toml`: audio skill config - `configs/crypto.toml`: crypto risk and exchange config - `configs/i18n/*.toml`: text resources - `prompts/`: prompt templates - `migrations/`: database migrations - `UI/`: browser UI - `pi_app/`: desktop mini app and small-screen monitor - `systemd/`: service templates - `crates/clawd`: API, routing, queue, memory, scheduling - `crates/skills/*`: skill implementations ## Small-Screen Desktop App The small-screen desktop app lives in `pi_app/`. ```bash cd pi_app && ./run-small-screen.sh cd pi_app && ./install-desktop.sh cd pi_app && ./enable-autostart.sh cd pi_app && ./open-small-screen.sh ``` It reads `GET /v1/health`, so `clawd` must already be running. ## Notes - review and sanitize configs before production deployment - if `/usr/local/bin` is not writable, use `bash install-rustclaw-cmd.sh --user` - if `~/.local/bin` is not in `PATH`, add `export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"` - for service deployment, use `systemd/` as the starting point ## License This project uses a non-commercial source-available license. - English legal text: `LICENSE` - Chinese reference translation: `LICENSE.zh-CN.md`
messages: # RustClaw Chinese version: `README.zh-CN.md` RustClaw is a local Rust-based agent runtime for everyday operations through Telegram, WhatsApp, Feishu/Lark, and a browser UI. It combines task routing, tool execution, memory, scheduling, multimodal skills, and `user_key` based identity into one deployable stack. ## What It Is For RustClaw is designed to let you: - chat with an agent from multiple channels - run built-in skills such as file, HTTP, crypto, image, and service tasks - manage users and permissions with `user_key` - use a local UI for monitoring and daily administration - keep conversation memory and resumable multi-step tasks ## Quick Start ### 1. Prerequisites ```bash rustup default stable python3 --version ``` Python `3.11+` is recommended. ### 2. Install the `rustclaw` command ```bash # Standard install bash install-rustclaw-cmd.sh # Install without sudo bash install-rustclaw-cmd.sh --user ``` Verify: ```bash command -v rustclaw rustclaw -h rustclaw -status ``` ### 3. Configure your model and channels Main config: `configs/config.toml` Channel configs: - `configs/channels/telegram.toml` - `configs/channels/whatsapp.toml` - `configs/channels/feishu.toml` Common split configs: - `configs/image.toml` - `configs/audio.toml` - `configs/crypto.toml` ### 4. Start RustClaw ```bash # Full start with UI rustclaw -start --vendor openai --model gpt-4.1 --profile release --channels all --with-ui --quick # Another vendor example rustclaw -start --vendor qwen --model qwen-max-latest --profile release --channels all --quick # Simple mode rustclaw -start release all ``` ### 5. Daily operations ```bash rustclaw -status rustclaw -logs clawd 200 --follow rustclaw -health rustclaw -stop ``` Legacy scripts are still available: ```bash ./start-all.sh ./stop-rustclaw.sh ``` ## Keys, Identity, and Permissions RustClaw uses `user_key` as the primary identity across UI and messaging channels. - permissions are resolved by `user_key` - channel conversations are resolved by `channel + external_chat_id` - the UI uses the same auth model as Telegram and WhatsApp - `clawd` can bootstrap the first admin key when the auth table is empty Key management: ```bash rustclaw -key list rustclaw -key generate user rustclaw -key generate admin scripts/auth-key.sh list ``` ## Local UI and API The listen address is configured in `configs/config.toml`, usually `127.0.0.1:8787` or `0.0.0.0:8787`. UI: - URL: `http://127.0.0.1:8787/` - static files: `UI/dist` - override UI directory with `RUSTCLAW_UI_DIST` - the browser stores a valid `user_key` locally and sends it with `X-RustClaw-Key` Important API endpoints: - `GET /v1/health` - `POST /v1/tasks` - `GET /v1/tasks/{task_id}` - `POST /v1/tasks/cancel` - `GET /v1/auth/me` - `POST /v1/auth/channel/bind` - `GET/POST /v1/auth/crypto-credentials` Examples: ```bash curl http://127.0.0.1:8787/v1/health \ -H "X-RustClaw-Key: rk-xxxx" curl -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8787/v1/tasks \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -H "X-RustClaw-Key: rk-xxxx" \ -d '{"user_id":1,"chat_id":1,"user_key":"rk-xxxx","channel":"ui","external_user_id":"local-ui","external_chat_id":"local-ui","kind":"ask","payload":{"text":"hello","agent_mode":true}}' ``` ## Common Telegram Commands - `/start` - `/help` - `/agent on|off` - `/status` - `/cancel` - `/skills` - `/run ` - `/sendfile ` - `/voicemode show|voice|text|both|reset` - `/openclaw config show|vendors|set ` - `/cryptoapi show` - `/cryptoapi set binance ` - `/cryptoapi set okx ` ## Crypto Credentials Exchange credentials are stored per `user_key`, not as one shared global secret for all users. - supported live exchanges: `binance`, `okx` - risk controls are defined in `configs/crypto.toml` - credentials are stored in `exchange_api_credentials` - each `user_key` has its own exchange credential record You can manage crypto credentials through: - `GET/POST /v1/auth/crypto-credentials` - Telegram `/cryptoapi ...` commands - `scripts/import-crypto-credentials.sh` for legacy migration ## Built-in Skills Common built-in skills include: - `archive_basic` - `audio_synthesize` - `audio_transcribe` - `chat` - `config_guard` - `crypto` - `db_basic` - `docker_basic` - `fs_search` - `git_basic` - `health_check` - `http_basic` - `image_edit` - `image_generate` - `image_vision` - `log_analyze` - `package_manager` - `process_basic` - `rss_fetch` - `service_control` - `system_basic` - `x` ## Important Files and Directories - `configs/config.toml`: main runtime config - `configs/channels/*.toml`: channel-specific config - `configs/image.toml`: image skill config - `configs/audio.toml`: audio skill config - `configs/crypto.toml`: crypto risk and exchange config - `configs/i18n/*.toml`: text resources - `prompts/`: prompt templates - `migrations/`: database migrations - `UI/`: browser UI - `pi_app/`: desktop mini app and small-screen monitor - `systemd/`: service templates - `crates/clawd`: API, routing, queue, memory, scheduling - `crates/skills/*`: skill implementations ## Small-Screen Desktop App The small-screen desktop app lives in `pi_app/`. ```bash cd pi_app && ./run-small-screen.sh cd pi_app && ./install-desktop.sh cd pi_app && ./enable-autostart.sh cd pi_app && ./open-small-screen.sh ``` It reads `GET /v1/health`, so `clawd` must already be running. ## Notes - review and sanitize configs before production deployment - if `/usr/local/bin` is not writable, use `bash install-rustclaw-cmd.sh --user` - if `~/.local/bin` is not in `PATH`, add `export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"` - for service deployment, use `systemd/` as the starting point ## License This project uses a non-commercial source-available license. - English legal text: `LICENSE` - Chinese reference translation: `LICENSE.zh-CN.md`

turn1.prompt: 把那个配置文件发给我
turn1.text: 请告诉我需要发送的配置文件名称或路径。

turn2.text:
```toml
# 用途/Purpose: 命令意图识别与规则目录配置.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 可按部署语言与规则目录调整.
# 风险/Risk: locale 或 rules_dir 配错会导致意图识别退化.
[command_intent]
# 默认语言 / Default locale for intent parsing.
default_locale = "zh-CN"
# 当主链路失败时是否启用 LLM 回退 / Enable LLM fallback when rule match fails.
llm_fallback_enabled = true
# 规则目录 / Rule files directory.
rules_dir = "configs/command_intent"

# 用途/Purpose: 数据库连接基础参数.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 可改（尤其是路径）.
# 风险/Risk: 超时太短会频繁 busy；路径错误会导致服务无法启动/读写.
[database]
# SQLite busy 超时（毫秒） / SQLite busy timeout in milliseconds.
busy_timeout_ms = 2000
# SQLite 文件路径 / SQLite file path.
sqlite_path = "data/rustclaw.db"

# 用途/Purpose: 文档/文件生成默认输出目录.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 可改.
# 风险/Risk: 目录不可写会导致文件生成失败.
[file_generation]
default_output_dir = "document"

# Image skill config moved to configs/image.toml (supports default_model + <vendor>_models fallback) / 图片技能配置已拆分到 configs/image.toml（支持 default_model + 按厂商备选模型）

# Audio skill config moved to configs/audio.toml (supports default_model + <vendor>_models fallback) / 语音技能配置已拆分到 configs/audio.toml（支持 default_model + 按厂商备选模型）

# 用途/Purpose: 全局与单用户限流.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 可改，建议结合流量观测渐进调整.
# 风险/Risk: 太低会限流过严；太高可能触发上游配额或成本飙升.
[limits]
# 全局每分钟请求数 / Global requests per minute.
global_rpm = 60
# 单用户每分钟请求数 / Per-user requests per minute.
user_rpm = 20

# 用途/Purpose: LLM 路由默认选择（厂商与模型）.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 可改.
# 风险/Risk: vendor/model 不匹配会导致调用失败.
[llm]
# 默认模型名 / Default selected model.
selected_model = "MiniMax-M2.7"
# 默认厂商标识 / Default selected vendor.
selected_vendor = "minimax"

# 用途/Purpose: Anthropic 提供商连接与模型池.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 可改，需保证 key/base_url/model 对齐.
# 风险/Risk: key 无效或 URL 错误会直接失败；并发过高可能触发限流.
[llm.anthropic]
api_key = ""
base_url = "https://api.anthropic.com/v1"
# 该提供商最大并发 / Max concurrency for this provider.
max_concurrency = 1
# 默认模型 / Default model for this provider.
model = "claude-sonnet-4-6"
# 可选模型池 / Allowed model candidates.
models = [
    # 4.6 (latest / 最新)
    "claude-opus-4-6",           # Top intelligence, agent/coding 最强智能 $5/$25
    "claude-sonnet-4-6",         # Balanced speed/intelligence 均衡推荐 $3/$15
    # 4.5
    "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001", # Fastest, high-throughput 最快低延迟 $1/$5
    # Legacy / 旧版
    "claude-3-7-sonnet-latest",
    "claude-3-5-haiku-latest",
]
# 单次请求超时（秒） / Request timeout in seconds.
timeout_seconds = 60

# 用途/Purpose: Google 提供商连接与模型池.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 可改.
# 风险/Risk: 预览模型可能变更快，需关注兼容性与稳定性.
[llm.google]
api_key = ""
base_url = "https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta"
max_concurrency = 1
model = "gemini-2.5-pro"
models = [
    # 3.x (latest preview / 最新预览)
    "gemini-3.1-pro-preview",  # Flagship reasoning+agent 旗舰推理 preview
    "gemini-3-flash-preview",  # Frontier low-cost 前沿低成本 preview
    # 2.5 (stable / 稳定版)
    "gemini-2.5-pro",          # Advanced reasoning w/ thinking 高级推理
    "gemini-2.5-flash",        # Fast & cost-effective 高性价比低延迟
    "gemini-2.5-flash-lite",   # Cheapest & fastest 最快最便宜
]
timeout_seconds = 90

# 用途/Purpose: Grok 提供商连接与模型池.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 可改，模型上下线较快，建议保留至少一个稳定回退模型.
# 风险/Risk: 模型名与官方上线节奏变化较快，建议保留一个稳态回退模型.
[llm.grok]
api_key = ""
base_url = "https://api.x.ai/v1"
max_concurrency = 1
model = "grok-3"
models = [
    # Grok 4
    "grok-4-0709",                 # Flagship reasoning 旗舰推理 256k $3/$15
    "grok-4-1-fast-reasoning",     # Fast reasoning 快速推理 2M ctx $0.2/$0.5
    "grok-4-1-fast-non-reasoning", # Fast non-reasoning 快速非推理 2M ctx $0.2/$0.5
    # Grok 3
    "grok-3",                      # General purpose 通用 131k $3/$15
    "grok-3-mini",                 # Lightweight 轻量高性价比 131k $0.3/$0.5
    # Specialized / 专用
    "grok-code-fast-1",            # Code-dedicated 代码专用 256k
    # Legacy / 旧版
    "grok-2-vision-1212",          # Vision model 视觉 32k
]
timeout_seconds = 60

# 用途/Purpose: DeepSeek 提供商连接与模型池（OpenAI-compatible）.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 可改，适合补充高性价比推理/编码模型.
# 风险/Risk: 模型名与官方上线节奏变化较快，建议保留一个稳态回退模型.
[llm.deepseek]
api_key = ""
base_url = "https://api.deepseek.com/v1"
max_concurrency = 1
model = "deepseek-chat"
models = [
    "deepseek-chat",
    "deepseek-reasoner",
]
timeout_seconds = 60

# 用途/Purpose: Qwen 提供商连接与模型池.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 可改.
# 风险/Risk: base_url 或鉴权不匹配会导致 401/404.
[llm.qwen]
api_key = ""
base_url = "https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1"
max_concurrency = 1
model = "qwen-max-latest"
models = [
    "qwen-max-latest",
    "qwen-plus-latest",
    "qwen-turbo-latest",
]
timeout_seconds = 60

# 用途/Purpose: MiniMax 提供商连接与模型池（OpenAI-compatible）.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 可改，建议按官方最新兼容模型名维护.
# api_format：省略或空则默认 openai_compat（/chat/completions + Bearer）；设为 anthropic_claude 则 /messages + x-api-key（clawd 合成 vendor-minimax）.
# 风险/Risk: 音频/图片相关能力与 OpenAI 兼容接口的覆盖范围可能有限，必要时需补原生适配.
[llm.minimax]
api_key = ""
base_url = "https://api.minimaxi.com/v1"
max_concurrency = 1
model = "MiniMax-M2.7"
models = [
    "MiniMax-M2.7",
    "MiniMax-M2.5",
    "MiniMax-M2.5-thinking",
    "MiniMax-M2.5-coder",
]
timeout_seconds = 60

# 用途/Purpose: 自定义 OpenAI-compatible 提供商.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 可改，适合接入私有网关.
# 风险/Risk: 协议不兼容会出现模型列表可见但调用失败.
[llm.custom]
api_key = ""
base_url = "https://api.example.com/v1"
max_concurrency = 1
model = "custom-model"
models = [
    "custom-model",
]
timeout_seconds = 60

# 用途/Purpose: OpenAI 提供商连接与模型池.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 可改.
# 风险/Risk: 模型名下线会报错；并发与超时需与上游配额匹配.
[llm.openai]
api_key = ""
base_url = "https://api.openai.com/v1"
max_concurrency = 1
model = "gpt-4o-mini"
models = [
    "gpt-5.2",
    "gpt-5.2-chat-latest",
    "gpt-5.1-chat-latest",
    "gpt-5.1",
    "gpt-5-chat-latest",
    "gpt-5",
    "gpt-4.1",
    "gpt-4.1-mini",
    "gpt-4o",
    "gpt-4o-mini",
]
timeout_seconds = 60

# 用途/Purpose: 清理/审计保留策略.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 可改，建议与磁盘容量和审计需求匹配.
# 风险/Risk: 保留太短会丢排障证据；太长会膨胀存储.
[maintenance]
# 审计表保留最大行数 / Max rows retained for audit logs.
audit_max_rows = 10000
# 审计保留天数 / Audit retention days.
audit_retention_days = 14
# 清理任务执行周期（秒） / Cleanup interval in seconds.
cleanup_interval_seconds = 300
# 任务表保留最大行数 / Max rows retained for tasks table.
tasks_max_rows = 2000
# 任务保留天数 / Task retention days.
tasks_retention_days = 7

# 用途/Purpose: 记忆模块独立配置入口.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 一般不改，除非你迁移了路径.
# 风险/Risk: 路径错误会导致记忆模块配置加载失败.
[memory]
config_path = "configs/memory.toml"

# 用途/Purpose: 人设模板目录与默认 profile.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 可改.
# 风险/Risk: profile 不存在会回退或导致提示词装配失败.
[persona]
dir = "prompts/personas"
profile = "executor"

# 用途/Purpose: 路由调试开关.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 线上建议 false，排障时临时开启.
# 风险/Risk: 开启会增加日志噪音，可能暴露更多 prompt 细节.
[routing]
debug_log_prompt = false

# 用途/Purpose: 日程相关 i18n 与意图提示词配置.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 可改.
# 风险/Risk: 路径不一致会导致 schedule 意图识别/回复异常.
[schedule]
i18n_dir = "configs/i18n"
intent_prompt_path = "prompts/schedule_intent_prompt.md"
intent_rules_path = "prompts/schedule_intent_rules.md"
locale = "zh-CN"
timezone = "Asia/Shanghai"

# 用途/Purpose: HTTP 服务监听与请求超时.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 可改.
# 风险/Risk: 监听地址改为 0.0.0.0 会暴露外网；超时过低会误中断.
# listen 填 0.0.0.0:8787 可公网访问；同机 telegramd/whatsappd 会连 127.0.0.1:8787。
# clawd_base_url（可选）：telegramd/whatsappd 连 clawd 的地址；未设则用 http://{listen}。
#clawd_base_url = "http://127.0.0.1:8787"
[server]
listen = "0.0.0.0:8787"
request_timeout_seconds = 30
# 用途/Purpose: 技能执行并发/超时与启用基线.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 可改，但建议优先用 skill_switches 管理开关.
# 风险/Risk: 并发过高可能争用资源；超时过低会误判失败.
[skills]
# 技能注册表路径（启用后走 registry 主链：发现/启用/kind 分发）；未设则 fallback 到 skills_list + skill_switches
registry_path = "configs/skills_registry.toml"
skill_switches = { browser_web = true, doc_parse = true, kb = true, reference_resolver = true, schedule = true, stock = true, task_control = true, transform = true, weather = true, web_search_extract = true }
skill_max_concurrency = 1
skill_timeout_seconds = 86400
# 可选开关覆盖（优先级高于 skills_list，且可覆盖 core-floor 默认启用）/ Optional switch overrides (higher than skills_list; false can override core-floor):
# - 设为 false: 强制关闭该技能（含 core-floor，不会进入二层路由提示词，也不可执行）/ Set false: force disable this skill (including core-floor).
# - 设为 true : 强制开启该技能（会进入二层路由提示词，且可执行）/ Set true: force enable this skill.
# 建议用 skill_switches 控制开关，尽量不要直接改 skills_list，避免启用基线被误改。/ Prefer skill_switches for toggles; avoid editing baseline list directly.
# 例子/Example:
# skill_switches = { image_generate = false, rss_fetch = true }
# 技能基线列表（建议少改）/ Baseline enabled skills (avoid frequent edits).
# 与 configs/skills_registry.toml 中全部 [[skills]].name 一致（未启用 registry 时作 fallback 基线）。
skills_list = [
    "run_cmd",
    "read_file",
    "write_file",
    "list_dir",
    "make_dir",
    "remove_file",
    "schedule",
    "x",
    "system_basic",
    "http_basic",
    "git_basic",
    "install_module",
    "process_basic",
    "package_manager",
    "archive_basic",
    "db_basic",
    "docker_basic",
    "fs_search",
    "rss_fetch",
    "image_vision",
    "image_generate",
    "image_edit",
    "audio_transcribe",
    "audio_synthesize",
    "health_check",
    "log_analyze",
    "service_control",
    "task_control",
    "config_guard",
    "crypto",
    "chat",
    "stock",
    "weather",
    "reference_resolver",
    "doc_parse",
    "transform",
    "web_search_extract",
    "kb",
    "browser_web",
]

# 渠道配置已拆分到以下文件 / Channel configs are split into:
# - configs/channels/telegram.toml（Telegram）/ Telegram channel settings
# - configs/channels/whatsapp-cloud.toml（WhatsApp Cloud / webhook）/ WhatsApp Cloud settings
# - configs/channels/whatsapp-web.toml（WhatsApp Web / QR login）/ WhatsApp Web settings
# - configs/channels/whatsapp.toml 仅作为旧混合配置兼容入口，建议不要再写实际配置

# 用途/Purpose: 预留 Slack 适配器配置（当前占位）.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 未接入前可保持默认.
# 风险/Risk: 提前启用但 endpoint 无效会导致投递失败.
[adapters.slack]
enabled = false
endpoint = ""
note = "placeholder"

# 用途/Purpose: 预留 Discord 适配器配置（当前占位）.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 未接入前可保持默认.
# 风险/Risk: 提前启用但 endpoint 无效会导致投递失败.
[adapters.discord]
enabled = false
endpoint = ""
note = "placeholder"

# 用途/Purpose: 工具执行白名单/黑名单与权限配置.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 生产环境建议收紧 allow/deny 与 sudo.
# 风险/Risk: 当前 `allow=*` + `allow_sudo=true` 权限非常高，误调用风险显著.
[tools]
allow = ["*"]
allow_path_outside_workspace = true
allow_sudo = true
cmd_timeout_seconds = 60
deny = []
max_cmd_length = 2400
profile = "full"

# 用途/Purpose: 按模型提供商细化工具 allow/deny 覆盖.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 可改，建议用于高风险提供商最小权限化.
# 风险/Risk: 配置冲突会导致行为与预期不一致（被拒/过放开）.
[tools.by_provider.anthropic]
allow = []
deny = []

[tools.by_provider.google]
allow = []
deny = []

[tools.by_provider.grok]
allow = []
deny = []

[tools.by_provider.openai]
allow = []
deny = []

# 用途/Purpose: worker 拉取队列并发与超时.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 可改，需结合机器资源与任务负载.
# 风险/Risk: 并发太高会争用 CPU/IO；队列太小会丢积压能力.
[worker]
# worker 并发数 / Number of concurrent workers.
concurrency = 3
# 轮询间隔（毫秒） / Queue polling interval in milliseconds.
poll_interval_ms = 500
# 队列上限 / Max queued tasks in memory.
queue_limit = 128
# 运行中心跳间隔（秒）：执行长任务时周期刷新 updated_at，避免误判"卡死"。
task_heartbeat_seconds = 30
# 运行中"无进展"超时（秒）：status=running 且 updated_at 长时间不变会自动收尾为 failed。
running_no_progress_timeout_seconds = 1200
# 无进展清理检查间隔（秒）。
running_recovery_check_interval_seconds = 60
#
messages:
```toml
# 用途/Purpose: 命令意图识别与规则目录配置.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 可按部署语言与规则目录调整.
# 风险/Risk: locale 或 rules_dir 配错会导致意图识别退化.
[command_intent]
# 默认语言 / Default locale for intent parsing.
default_locale = "zh-CN"
# 当主链路失败时是否启用 LLM 回退 / Enable LLM fallback when rule match fails.
llm_fallback_enabled = true
# 规则目录 / Rule files directory.
rules_dir = "configs/command_intent"

# 用途/Purpose: 数据库连接基础参数.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 可改（尤其是路径）.
# 风险/Risk: 超时太短会频繁 busy；路径错误会导致服务无法启动/读写.
[database]
# SQLite busy 超时（毫秒） / SQLite busy timeout in milliseconds.
busy_timeout_ms = 2000
# SQLite 文件路径 / SQLite file path.
sqlite_path = "data/rustclaw.db"

# 用途/Purpose: 文档/文件生成默认输出目录.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 可改.
# 风险/Risk: 目录不可写会导致文件生成失败.
[file_generation]
default_output_dir = "document"

# Image skill config moved to configs/image.toml (supports default_model + <vendor>_models fallback) / 图片技能配置已拆分到 configs/image.toml（支持 default_model + 按厂商备选模型）

# Audio skill config moved to configs/audio.toml (supports default_model + <vendor>_models fallback) / 语音技能配置已拆分到 configs/audio.toml（支持 default_model + 按厂商备选模型）

# 用途/Purpose: 全局与单用户限流.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 可改，建议结合流量观测渐进调整.
# 风险/Risk: 太低会限流过严；太高可能触发上游配额或成本飙升.
[limits]
# 全局每分钟请求数 / Global requests per minute.
global_rpm = 60
# 单用户每分钟请求数 / Per-user requests per minute.
user_rpm = 20

# 用途/Purpose: LLM 路由默认选择（厂商与模型）.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 可改.
# 风险/Risk: vendor/model 不匹配会导致调用失败.
[llm]
# 默认模型名 / Default selected model.
selected_model = "MiniMax-M2.7"
# 默认厂商标识 / Default selected vendor.
selected_vendor = "minimax"

# 用途/Purpose: Anthropic 提供商连接与模型池.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 可改，需保证 key/base_url/model 对齐.
# 风险/Risk: key 无效或 URL 错误会直接失败；并发过高可能触发限流.
[llm.anthropic]
api_key = ""
base_url = "https://api.anthropic.com/v1"
# 该提供商最大并发 / Max concurrency for this provider.
max_concurrency = 1
# 默认模型 / Default model for this provider.
model = "claude-sonnet-4-6"
# 可选模型池 / Allowed model candidates.
models = [
    # 4.6 (latest / 最新)
    "claude-opus-4-6",           # Top intelligence, agent/coding 最强智能 $5/$25
    "claude-sonnet-4-6",         # Balanced speed/intelligence 均衡推荐 $3/$15
    # 4.5
    "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001", # Fastest, high-throughput 最快低延迟 $1/$5
    # Legacy / 旧版
    "claude-3-7-sonnet-latest",
    "claude-3-5-haiku-latest",
]
# 单次请求超时（秒） / Request timeout in seconds.
timeout_seconds = 60

# 用途/Purpose: Google 提供商连接与模型池.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 可改.
# 风险/Risk: 预览模型可能变更快，需关注兼容性与稳定性.
[llm.google]
api_key = ""
base_url = "https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta"
max_concurrency = 1
model = "gemini-2.5-pro"
models = [
    # 3.x (latest preview / 最新预览)
    "gemini-3.1-pro-preview",  # Flagship reasoning+agent 旗舰推理 preview
    "gemini-3-flash-preview",  # Frontier low-cost 前沿低成本 preview
    # 2.5 (stable / 稳定版)
    "gemini-2.5-pro",          # Advanced reasoning w/ thinking 高级推理
    "gemini-2.5-flash",        # Fast & cost-effective 高性价比低延迟
    "gemini-2.5-flash-lite",   # Cheapest & fastest 最快最便宜
]
timeout_seconds = 90

# 用途/Purpose: Grok 提供商连接与模型池.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 可改，模型上下线较快，建议保留至少一个稳定回退模型.
# 风险/Risk: 模型名与官方上线节奏变化较快，建议保留一个稳态回退模型.
[llm.grok]
api_key = ""
base_url = "https://api.x.ai/v1"
max_concurrency = 1
model = "grok-3"
models = [
    # Grok 4
    "grok-4-0709",                 # Flagship reasoning 旗舰推理 256k $3/$15
    "grok-4-1-fast-reasoning",     # Fast reasoning 快速推理 2M ctx $0.2/$0.5
    "grok-4-1-fast-non-reasoning", # Fast non-reasoning 快速非推理 2M ctx $0.2/$0.5
    # Grok 3
    "grok-3",                      # General purpose 通用 131k $3/$15
    "grok-3-mini",                 # Lightweight 轻量高性价比 131k $0.3/$0.5
    # Specialized / 专用
    "grok-code-fast-1",            # Code-dedicated 代码专用 256k
    # Legacy / 旧版
    "grok-2-vision-1212",          # Vision model 视觉 32k
]
timeout_seconds = 60

# 用途/Purpose: DeepSeek 提供商连接与模型池（OpenAI-compatible）.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 可改，适合补充高性价比推理/编码模型.
# 风险/Risk: 模型名与官方上线节奏变化较快，建议保留一个稳态回退模型.
[llm.deepseek]
api_key = ""
base_url = "https://api.deepseek.com/v1"
max_concurrency = 1
model = "deepseek-chat"
models = [
    "deepseek-chat",
    "deepseek-reasoner",
]
timeout_seconds = 60

# 用途/Purpose: Qwen 提供商连接与模型池.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 可改.
# 风险/Risk: base_url 或鉴权不匹配会导致 401/404.
[llm.qwen]
api_key = ""
base_url = "https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1"
max_concurrency = 1
model = "qwen-max-latest"
models = [
    "qwen-max-latest",
    "qwen-plus-latest",
    "qwen-turbo-latest",
]
timeout_seconds = 60

# 用途/Purpose: MiniMax 提供商连接与模型池（OpenAI-compatible）.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 可改，建议按官方最新兼容模型名维护.
# api_format：省略或空则默认 openai_compat（/chat/completions + Bearer）；设为 anthropic_claude 则 /messages + x-api-key（clawd 合成 vendor-minimax）.
# 风险/Risk: 音频/图片相关能力与 OpenAI 兼容接口的覆盖范围可能有限，必要时需补原生适配.
[llm.minimax]
api_key = ""
base_url = "https://api.minimaxi.com/v1"
max_concurrency = 1
model = "MiniMax-M2.7"
models = [
    "MiniMax-M2.7",
    "MiniMax-M2.5",
    "MiniMax-M2.5-thinking",
    "MiniMax-M2.5-coder",
]
timeout_seconds = 60

# 用途/Purpose: 自定义 OpenAI-compatible 提供商.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 可改，适合接入私有网关.
# 风险/Risk: 协议不兼容会出现模型列表可见但调用失败.
[llm.custom]
api_key = ""
base_url = "https://api.example.com/v1"
max_concurrency = 1
model = "custom-model"
models = [
    "custom-model",
]
timeout_seconds = 60

# 用途/Purpose: OpenAI 提供商连接与模型池.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 可改.
# 风险/Risk: 模型名下线会报错；并发与超时需与上游配额匹配.
[llm.openai]
api_key = ""
base_url = "https://api.openai.com/v1"
max_concurrency = 1
model = "gpt-4o-mini"
models = [
    "gpt-5.2",
    "gpt-5.2-chat-latest",
    "gpt-5.1-chat-latest",
    "gpt-5.1",
    "gpt-5-chat-latest",
    "gpt-5",
    "gpt-4.1",
    "gpt-4.1-mini",
    "gpt-4o",
    "gpt-4o-mini",
]
timeout_seconds = 60

# 用途/Purpose: 清理/审计保留策略.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 可改，建议与磁盘容量和审计需求匹配.
# 风险/Risk: 保留太短会丢排障证据；太长会膨胀存储.
[maintenance]
# 审计表保留最大行数 / Max rows retained for audit logs.
audit_max_rows = 10000
# 审计保留天数 / Audit retention days.
audit_retention_days = 14
# 清理任务执行周期（秒） / Cleanup interval in seconds.
cleanup_interval_seconds = 300
# 任务表保留最大行数 / Max rows retained for tasks table.
tasks_max_rows = 2000
# 任务保留天数 / Task retention days.
tasks_retention_days = 7

# 用途/Purpose: 记忆模块独立配置入口.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 一般不改，除非你迁移了路径.
# 风险/Risk: 路径错误会导致记忆模块配置加载失败.
[memory]
config_path = "configs/memory.toml"

# 用途/Purpose: 人设模板目录与默认 profile.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 可改.
# 风险/Risk: profile 不存在会回退或导致提示词装配失败.
[persona]
dir = "prompts/personas"
profile = "executor"

# 用途/Purpose: 路由调试开关.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 线上建议 false，排障时临时开启.
# 风险/Risk: 开启会增加日志噪音，可能暴露更多 prompt 细节.
[routing]
debug_log_prompt = false

# 用途/Purpose: 日程相关 i18n 与意图提示词配置.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 可改.
# 风险/Risk: 路径不一致会导致 schedule 意图识别/回复异常.
[schedule]
i18n_dir = "configs/i18n"
intent_prompt_path = "prompts/schedule_intent_prompt.md"
intent_rules_path = "prompts/schedule_intent_rules.md"
locale = "zh-CN"
timezone = "Asia/Shanghai"

registry_path = "configs/skills_registry.toml"
skill_switches = { browser_web = true, doc_parse = true, kb = true, reference_resolver = true, schedule = true, stock = true, task_control = true, transform = true, weather = true, web_search_extract = true }
skill_max_concurrency = 1
skill_timeout_seconds = 86400
# 可选开关覆盖（优先级高于 skills_list，且可覆盖 core-floor 默认启用）/ Optional switch overrides (higher than skills_list; false can override core-floor):

# 用途/Purpose: 工具执行白名单/黑名单与权限配置.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 生产环境建议收紧 allow/deny 与 sudo.
# 风险/Risk: 当前 `allow=*` + `allow_sudo=true` 权限非常高，误调用风险显著.
[tools]
allow = ["*"]
allow_path_outside_workspace = true
allow_sudo = true
cmd_timeout_seconds = 60
deny = []
max_cmd_length = 2400
profile = "full"

# 用途/Purpose: 按模型提供商细化工具 allow/deny 覆盖.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 可改，建议用于高风险提供商最小权限化.
# 风险/Risk: 配置冲突会导致行为与预期不一致（被拒/过放开）.
[tools.by_provider.anthropic]
allow = []
deny = []

[tools.by_provider.google]
allow = []
deny = []

[tools.by_provider.grok]
allow = []
deny = []

[tools.by_provider.openai]
allow = []
deny = []

# 用途/Purpose: worker 拉取队列并发与超时.
# 建议修改/Recommended change: 可改，需结合机器资源与任务负载.
# 风险/Risk: 并发太高会争用 CPU/IO；队列太小会丢积压能力.
[worker]
# worker 并发数 / Number of concurrent workers.
concurrency = 3
# 轮询间隔（毫秒） / Queue polling interval in milliseconds.
poll_interval_ms = 500
# 队列上限 / Max queued tasks in memory.
queue_limit = 128
# 运行中心跳间隔（秒）：执行长任务时周期刷新 updated_at，避免误判"卡死"。
task_heartbeat_seconds = 30
# 运行中"无进展"超时（秒）：status=running 且 updated_at 长时间不变会自动收尾为 failed。
running_no_progress_timeout_seconds = 1200
# 无进展清理检查间隔（秒）。
running_recovery_check_interval_seconds = 60
#
